author: Daniel Wahnich
name: Aweb Optimized Baseline — Muon tuning + MLP 3x + seq2048
blurb: Baseline architecture (9 layers, 512 dim) with proven optimizer settings from top scorers: Muon momentum 0.99, halved learning rates (0.02), 3x MLP expansion, seq_len 2048, grad clip 0.3, warmdown 3000 iters, momentum warmup 0.92→0.99 over 1500 steps. 13,442 steps in 600s on 8xH100. Train-on-val enabled (organizer-approved).
